sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8018" key="a)ndro/pornos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρό-πορνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n8018.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cinaedus,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
